channel.title: Microgreens on emsenn.net
channel.description: Recent content in Microgreens on emsenn.net

item.title: Home Microgreens Setup
item.description:
Audience: beginners who want to grow microgreens indoors.

Learning goal: list the basic materials and steps for a simple home tray setup.

Materials

  • shallow tray with drainage
  • growing medium (coconut coir or potting mix)
  • seeds labeled for microgreens
  • light source or sunny window

Steps

  1. Fill the tray with a thin layer of medium and moisten it.
  2. Scatter seeds evenly, then press gently into the surface.
  3. Cover lightly and keep moist until germination.
  4. Move to light and water from below if possible.

Check for understanding: Why is a shallow tray preferred for microgreens?

item.title: Genealogy of Microgreens
item.description: This genealogy traces how microgreens emerged from culinary and horticultural practice.

item.title: History of Microgreens
item.description: This history summarizes how microgreens spread as a food and gardening practice.

item.title: Microgreens Overview
item.description: Microgreens are harvested young and grown in shallow trays with light and consistent moisture.
